title: Set up pay-as-you-go pricing
description: Charge customers based on their actual usage with per-unit pricing.

steps.title: Set up customer
steps.description: Create a customer that you will subscribe to your pricing plan.

nodes.title: Create a customer
nodes.description: Create a customer to subscribe to the pricing plan.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

steps.title: Create Pricing Plan
steps.description: Create a Pricing Plan and a meter to track usage events.

nodes.title: Create a Pricing Plan
nodes.description: Create a Pricing Plan to serve as the container for your pay-as-you-go pricing components.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create a meter
nodes.description: Create a meter to track usage events reported to Stripe.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

steps.title: Add a rate card
steps.description: Configure and attach a rate card to define per-unit usage pricing.

nodes.title: Create a rate card
nodes.description: Create a rate card with monthly service intervals for usage-based billing.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create a metered item
nodes.description: Create a metered item to link the meter to a billable item.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Add rate to rate card
nodes.description: Add a flat per-unit rate to the rate card.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Attach rate card to Pricing Plan
nodes.description: Attach the rate card to the Pricing Plan to complete the pay-as-you-go billing structure.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

steps.title: Subscribe customer to Pricing Plan
steps.description: Create a checkout session to subscribe the customer to the pay-as-you-go Pricing Plan.

nodes.title: Set live version to latest
nodes.description: Activate the Pricing Plan so new subscriptions use it.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create checkout session
nodes.description: Create a checkout session to activate the Pricing Plan subscription.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Complete the checkout
nodes.description: Complete the hosted checkout page to complete the subscription flow.
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.

nodes.title: Wait for servicing activated event
nodes.description: Wait for the pricing plan subscription to be activated for servicing.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the relevant Stripe CLI trigger or complete the upstream flow, then confirm the handler receives and verifies the expected event.
